tamarin_model.theory_code:
theory LevelControl_FSM
begin

/* Level Control Cluster FSM Model (Corrected) */

/* ------------------------------------------------
 * 1. FUNCTIONS (Single Block)
 * ------------------------------------------------ */
functions:
  /* Booleans & Null */
  b_true/0, b_false/0, null/0,

  /* States */
  st_IdleOffLevelUndefined/0,
  st_IdleOffLevelDefined/0,
  st_IdleOn/0,
  st_MovingToLevel/0,
  st_MovingContinuouslyUp/0,
  st_MovingContinuouslyDown/0,
  st_FrequencyControlIdle/0,

  /* Timers */
  tv_zero/0,         /* 0 */
  tv_pos/0,          /* >0 finite */
  tv_indet/0,        /* IndeterminateContinuous */

  /* Levels (symbolic) */
  lv_undef/0,
  lv_min/0,
  lv_mid/0,
  lv_max/0,

  /* Frequencies (symbolic) */
  fq_undef/0,
  fq_val/0,

  /* Directions */
  dir_none/0,
  dir_up/0,
  dir_down/0,

  /* Features (FeatureMap bits) */
  f_LT/0,   /* Lighting feature */
  f_FQ/0,   /* Frequency feature */

  /* Options flag: ExecuteIfOff effective value */
  eio_0/0,
  eio_1/0,

  /* LastCommandHadOnOffLinkage flag */
  lcl_false/0,
  lcl_true/0

/* ------------------------------------------------
 * 2. STATE FACT
 *    Arity must be constant across all uses.
 *    St(tid,
 *       state,
 *       onoff,          (b_true/b_false/null)
 *       currentLevel,   (lv_undef/lv_min/lv_mid/lv_max)
 *       remainingTime,  (tv_zero/tv_pos/tv_indet)
 *       targetLevel,    (lv_undef/lv_min/lv_mid/lv_max)
 *       moveDirection,  (dir_none/dir_up/dir_down)
 *       lastLink,       (lcl_false/lcl_true)
 *       currentFreq,    (fq_undef/fq_val)
 *       configTag1,     (b_true/b_false/null)   -- unused hook
 *       configTag2      (b_true/b_false/null)   -- unused hook
 *    )
 * ------------------------------------------------ */

/* ------------------------------------------------
 * 3. CONFIG FACT
 *    Persistent, per-device
 * ------------------------------------------------ */
facts:
  St/11,
  !Config/4,
  ClusterInit/1,
  Command/2,
  StateTransition/3

/* !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, effExecuteIfOff) */

/* ------------------------------------------------
 * 4. INITIALIZATION
 *    Single global initial rule, unique per tid
 *    Start in IdleOffLevelUndefined.
 * ------------------------------------------------ */

rule Init_Cluster:
  [ Fr(tid) ]
--[ ClusterInit(tid) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelUndefined,
       b_false,       /* OnOffCluster.OnOff == FALSE */
       lv_undef,      /* CurrentLevel undefined/outside range */
       tv_zero,       /* RemainingTime == 0 */
       lv_undef,      /* TargetLevel */
       dir_none,      /* MoveDirection */
       lcl_false,     /* LastCommandHadOnOffLinkage */
       fq_undef,      /* CurrentFrequency */
       null,          /* configTag1 */
       null           /* configTag2 */
     ),
    /* Config: here we allow LT and FQ both true; abstraction. */
    !Config(tid, f_LT, f_FQ, eio_0)
  ]

/* ------------------------------------------------
 * 5. POWERUP TRANSITIONS (from IdleOffLevelUndefined)
 *    We model the 4 FSM branches as 4 separate rules.
 *    We do not encode actual StartUpCurrentLevel values;
 *    the split is by rule name only (abstract).
 * ------------------------------------------------ */

/* Case 1: LT == 1 && StartUpCurrentLevel == 0
 * IdleOffLevelUndefined -> IdleOffLevelDefined
 * CurrentLevel := MinLevel, RemainingTime := 0
 */
rule PowerUp_FromIdleOffU_LT_StartUpZero:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelUndefined,
       b_false,
       lv_undef,
       tv_zero,
       lv_undef,
       dir_none,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, f_LT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'PowerUp'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelUndefined, st_IdleOffLevelDefined) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       lv_min,
       tv_zero,
       lv_undef,
       dir_none,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, f_LT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* Case 2: LT == 1 && StartUpCurrentLevel == null
 * IdleOffLevelUndefined -> IdleOffLevelUndefined (CurrentLevel := PreviousNonNullLevel)
 * We abstract by staying undefined: non-deterministic choice in model.
 */
rule PowerUp_FromIdleOffU_LT_StartUpNull:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelUndefined,
       b_false,
       lv_undef,
       tv_zero,
       lv_undef,
       dir_none,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, f_LT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'PowerUp'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelUndefined, st_IdleOffLevelUndefined) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelUndefined,
       b_false,
       lv_undef,
       tv_zero,
       lv_undef,
       dir_none,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, f_LT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* Case 3: LT == 1 && StartUpCurrentLevel != 0 && != null
 * IdleOffLevelUndefined -> IdleOffLevelDefined
 * CurrentLevel := StartUpCurrentLevel (abstracted as lv_mid)
 */
rule PowerUp_FromIdleOffU_LT_StartUpNonZeroNonNull:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelUndefined,
       b_false,
       lv_undef,
       tv_zero,
       lv_undef,
       dir_none,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, f_LT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'PowerUp'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelUndefined, st_IdleOffLevelDefined) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       lv_mid,
       tv_zero,
       lv_undef,
       dir_none,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, f_LT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* Case 4: FeatureMap.LT == 0
 * IdleOffLevelUndefined -> IdleOffLevelUndefined
 * CurrentLevel unchanged (still abstract lv_undef), RemainingTime := 0.
 */
rule PowerUp_FromIdleOffU_NoLT:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelUndefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'PowerUp'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelUndefined, st_IdleOffLevelUndefined) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelUndefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* ------------------------------------------------
 * 6. MOVETOLEVE L COMMANDS
 * ------------------------------------------------ */

/* From IdleOffLevelUndefined, OnOff == FALSE:
 * Command has no effect on CurrentLevel or RemainingTime.
 */
rule MoveToLevel_FromIdleOffU_Off_NoEffect:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelUndefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'MoveToLevel'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelUndefined, st_IdleOffLevelUndefined) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelUndefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* From IdleOffLevelDefined, EIO=0, Off, rate-limited + ExecuteIfOff == 0:
 * No effect on level, remain IdleOffLevelDefined.
 */
rule MoveToLevel_FromIdleOffD_Off_EIO0_NoEffect:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio_0)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'MoveToLevel'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelDefined, st_IdleOffLevelDefined) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir_none,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio_0)
  ]

/* From IdleOffLevelDefined, EIO=1, Off, rate-limited:
 * Start finite transition while off: MovingToLevel.
 * We abstract target as lv_mid and RemainingTime as tv_pos.
 */
rule MoveToLevel_FromIdleOffD_Off_EIO1_StartFinite:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio_1)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'MoveToLevel'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelDefined, st_MovingToLevel) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingToLevel,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_pos,
       lv_mid,
       dir_up,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio_1)
  ]

/* From IdleOffLevelDefined, Off, no rate-limited support:
 * Start rapid finite transition; we still model as MovingToLevel.
 */
rule MoveToLevel_FromIdleOffD_Off_NoRate_StartFinite:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'MoveToLevel'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelDefined, st_MovingToLevel) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingToLevel,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_pos,
       lv_mid,
       dir_up,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* From IdleOn: start finite move to level while on. */
rule MoveToLevel_FromIdleOn_On_StartFinite:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOn,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'MoveToLevel'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOn, st_MovingToLevel) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingToLevel,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_pos,
       lv_mid,
       dir_up,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* ------------------------------------------------
 * 7. MOVETOL E VELWITHONOFF (representative key cases)
 * ------------------------------------------------ */

/* IdleOffLevelDefined, Off:
 * MoveToLevelWithOnOff turns device on and sets level.
 */
rule MoveToLevelWithOnOff_FromIdleOffD_Off_TurnOn:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'MoveToLevelWithOnOff'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelDefined, st_IdleOn) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOn,
       b_true,
       lv_mid,
       tv_pos,
       lv_mid,
       dir_up,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* IdleOffLevelUndefined, Off:
 * MoveToLevelWithOnOff turns device on and establishes defined level.
 */
rule MoveToLevelWithOnOff_FromIdleOffU_Off_TurnOn:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelUndefined,
       b_false,
       lv_undef,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'MoveToLevelWithOnOff'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelUndefined, st_IdleOn) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOn,
       b_true,
       lv_mid,
       tv_pos,
       lv_mid,
       dir_up,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* IdleOn, On, resulting level above min: stay on. */
rule MoveToLevelWithOnOff_FromIdleOn_On_AboveMin:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOn,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'MoveToLevelWithOnOff'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOn, st_IdleOn) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOn,
       b_true,
       lv_mid,
       tv_pos,
       lv_mid,
       dir_up,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* IdleOn, resulting level at device min: turn off. */
rule MoveToLevelWithOnOff_FromIdleOn_On_AtMin:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOn,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'MoveToLevelWithOnOff'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOn, st_IdleOffLevelDefined) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       lv_min,
       tv_pos,
       lv_min,
       dir_down,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* ------------------------------------------------
 * 8. MOVE (continuous) – key branches, including Rate==0 error
 * ------------------------------------------------ */

/* IdleOffLevelDefined, Off, EIO=0: no effect. */
rule Move_FromIdleOffD_Off_EIO0_NoEffect:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio_0)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'Move'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelDefined, st_IdleOffLevelDefined) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir_none,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio_0)
  ]

/* IdleOffLevelDefined, Off, EIO=1, MoveMode=Up, Rate!=0:
 * Enter MovingContinuouslyUp, RemainingTime=Indeterminate.
 */
rule Move_FromIdleOffD_Off_EIO1_Up_Cont:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio_1)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'Move'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelDefined, st_MovingContinuouslyUp) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingContinuouslyUp,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_indet,
       tgtL,
       dir_up,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio_1)
  ]

/* IdleOffLevelDefined, Off, EIO=1, MoveMode=Down, Rate!=0:
 * Enter MovingContinuouslyDown.
 */
rule Move_FromIdleOffD_Off_EIO1_Down_Cont:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio_1)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'Move'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelDefined, st_MovingContinuouslyDown) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingContinuouslyDown,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_indet,
       tgtL,
       dir_down,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio_1)
  ]

/* IdleOn, MoveMode=Up, Rate!=0: MovingContinuouslyUp while On. */
rule Move_FromIdleOn_On_Up_Cont:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOn,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'Move'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOn, st_MovingContinuouslyUp) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingContinuouslyUp,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_indet,
       tgtL,
       dir_up,
       lcl_false,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* IdleOn, MoveMode=Down, Rate!=0: MovingContinuouslyDown while On. */
rule Move_FromIdleOn_On_Down_Cont:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOn,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'Move'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOn, st_MovingContinuouslyDown) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingContinuouslyDown,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_indet,
       tgtL,
       dir_down,
       lcl_false,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* Rate == 0 invalid (abstracted as separate rule with same premises). */

/* IdleOffLevelDefined, Rate==0 -> INVALID_COMMAND (no state change) */
rule Move_FromIdleOffD_RateZero_Invalid:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       onoff,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'Move'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelDefined, st_IdleOffLevelDefined) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       onoff,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* IdleOn, Rate==0 -> INVALID_COMMAND (no state change) */
rule Move_FromIdleOn_RateZero_Invalid:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOn,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'Move'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOn, st_IdleOn) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOn,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* ------------------------------------------------
 * 9. STEP (finite) – key branches, StepSize!=0 and StepSize==0
 * ------------------------------------------------ */

/* IdleOffLevelDefined, Off, EIO=0, StepSize!=0: no effect. */
rule Step_FromIdleOffD_Off_EIO0_NoEffect:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio_0)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'Step'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelDefined, st_IdleOffLevelDefined) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio_0)
  ]

/* IdleOffLevelDefined, Off, EIO=1, StepSize!=0: MovingToLevel (finite step). */
rule Step_FromIdleOffD_Off_EIO1_StartFinite:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio_1)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'Step'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelDefined, st_MovingToLevel) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingToLevel,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_pos,
       lv_mid,
       dir_up,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio_1)
  ]

/* IdleOn, StepSize!=0: MovingToLevel (finite step). */
rule Step_FromIdleOn_On_StartFinite:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOn,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'Step'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOn, st_MovingToLevel) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingToLevel,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_pos,
       lv_mid,
       dir_up,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* IdleOffLevelDefined, StepSize==0 -> INVALID_COMMAND */
rule Step_FromIdleOffD_StepSizeZero_Invalid:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       onoff,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'Step'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_IdleOffLevelDefined, st_IdleOffLevelDefined) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       onoff,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* IdleOn, StepSize==0 -> INVALID_COMMAND */
rule Step_FromIdleOn_StepSizeZero_Invalid:
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOn,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,

       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),

  ]

/* ------------------------------------------------
 * 10. STOP / STOPWITHONOFF for MovingToLevel and continuous
 * ------------------------------------------------ */

/* MovingToLevel, Stop, On: freeze level and RemainingTime := 0, go to IdleOn. */
rule Stop_FromMovingToLevel_On_ToIdleOn:
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingToLevel,
       b_true,
       curL,
       remT,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'Stop'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_MovingToLevel, st_IdleOn) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOn,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir_none,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* MovingToLevel, Stop, Off: go to IdleOffLevelDefined. */
rule Stop_FromMovingToLevel_Off_ToIdleOffD:
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingToLevel,
       b_false,
       curL,
       remT,
       tgtL,
       dir,

       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),

/* ------------------------------------------------
 * 11. TIMER-DRIVEN MOVINGTOLEVEL
 * ------------------------------------------------ */

/* Timer Tick, RemainingTime > 1 (abstracted as tv_pos -> tv_pos):
 * Stay in MovingToLevel, intermediate level.
 */
rule TimerTick_MovingToLevel_Progress:
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingToLevel,
       onoff,
       curL,
       tv_pos,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'TimerTick'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_MovingToLevel, st_MovingToLevel) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingToLevel,
       onoff,
       curL,
       tv_pos,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* Timer Expiry, final level above min -> IdleOn if already on; we model as IdleOn. */
rule TimerExpiry_MovingToLevel_ToIdleOn:
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingToLevel,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_pos,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'TimerExpiry'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_MovingToLevel, st_IdleOn) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOn,
       b_true,
       tgtL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir_none,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* Timer Expiry, final level == min -> IdleOffLevelDefined. */
rule TimerExpiry_MovingToLevel_ToIdleOffD:
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingToLevel,
       onoff,
       curL,
       tv_pos,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'TimerExpiry'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_MovingToLevel, st_IdleOffLevelDefined) ]->

       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       onoff,
       tgtL,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir_none,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* ------------------------------------------------
 * 12. CONTINUOUS MOVE LIMIT EVENTS
 * ------------------------------------------------ */

/* MovingContinuouslyUp, ReachedMaxLevel, On: IdleOn at MaxLevel. */
rule ReachedMaxLevel_FromMovingContUp_On_ToIdleOn:
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingContinuouslyUp,
       b_true,
       curL,
       tv_indet,
       tgtL,
       dir_up,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'ReachedMaxLevel'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_MovingContinuouslyUp, st_IdleOn) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOn,
       b_true,
       lv_max,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir_none,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* MovingContinuouslyUp, ReachedMaxLevel, Off: IdleOffLevelDefined at MaxLevel. */
rule ReachedMaxLevel_FromMovingContUp_Off_ToIdleOffD:
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingContinuouslyUp,
       b_false,
       curL,
       tv_indet,
       tgtL,

  ]

       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       lv_max,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir_none,
       lastLink,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* MovingContinuouslyDown, ReachedMinLevel, LastCommandHadOnOffLinkage == false:
 * IdleOn at MinLevel.
 */
rule ReachedMinLevel_FromMovingContDown_NoLink_ToIdleOn:
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingContinuouslyDown,
       onoff,
       curL,
       tv_indet,
       tgtL,
       dir_down,
       lcl_false,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'ReachedMinLevel'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_MovingContinuouslyDown, st_IdleOn) ]->

       st_IdleOn,
       onoff,
       lv_min,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir_none,
       lcl_false,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* MovingContinuouslyDown, ReachedMinLevel, LastCommandHadOnOffLinkage == true:
 * IdleOffLevelDefined & OnOff := FALSE.
 */
rule ReachedMinLevel_FromMovingContDown_Link_ToIdleOffD:
  [ St(tid,
       st_MovingContinuouslyDown,
       onoff,
       curL,
       tv_indet,
       tgtL,
       dir_down,
       lcl_true,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'ReachedMinLevel'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_MovingContinuouslyDown, st_IdleOffLevelDefined) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_IdleOffLevelDefined,
       b_false,
       lv_min,
       tv_zero,
       tgtL,
       dir_none,
       lcl_true,
       curFq,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, featFQ, eio)
  ]

/* ------------------------------------------------
 * 13. FREQUENCY CONTROL (FrequencyControlIdle)
 * ------------------------------------------------ */

/* We treat FrequencyControlIdle as integrated via state arg.
 * Here we only model self-loop on MoveToClosestFrequency.
 */

/* ClosestSupportedFrequency != null (success). */
rule MoveToClosestFrequency_Success:
  [ St(tid,
       st_FrequencyControlIdle,
       onoff,
       curL,
       remT,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       fq_undef,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, f_FQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'MoveToClosestFrequency'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_FrequencyControlIdle, st_FrequencyControlIdle) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_FrequencyControlIdle,
       onoff,
       curL,
       remT,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       fq_val,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, f_FQ, eio)
  ]

/* ClosestSupportedFrequency == null -> CONSTRAINT_ERROR, no change. */
rule MoveToClosestFrequency_ConstraintError:
  [ St(tid,
       st_FrequencyControlIdle,
       onoff,
       curL,
       remT,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       fq_undef,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, f_FQ, eio)
  ]
--[ Command(tid, 'MoveToClosestFrequency'),
    StateTransition(tid, st_FrequencyControlIdle, st_FrequencyControlIdle) ]->
  [ St(tid,
       st_FrequencyControlIdle,
       onoff,
       curL,
       remT,
       tgtL,
       dir,
       lastLink,
       fq_undef,
       ct1,
       ct2),
    !Config(tid, featLT, f_FQ, eio)
  ]

/* ------------------------------------------------
 * 14. RESTRICTIONS
 * ------------------------------------------------ */

restriction UniqueInit:
  "All t #i #j. ClusterInit(t)@i & ClusterInit(t)@j ==> #i = #j"

restriction SameArity:
  \"All t s a1 a2 a3 a4 a5 a6 a7 a8 a9 a10 #i.
      St(t,s,a1,a2,a3,a4,a5,a6,a7,a8,a9,a10)@i ==> True\"

/* ------------------------------------------------
 * 15. LEMMAS
 * ------------------------------------------------ */

lemma sources [sources]:
  "All t s1 s2 #i.
     StateTransition(t,s1,s2)@i
     ==> Ex #j. ClusterInit(t)@j & j < i"

lemma executable_MoveToLevel: exists-trace
  "Ex t s1 s2 #i. StateTransition(t,s1,s2)@i & Command(t,'MoveToLevel')@i"

lemma executable_Move: exists-trace
  "Ex t s1 s2 #i. StateTransition(t,s1,s2)@i & Command(t,'Move')@i"

lemma executable_Step: exists-trace
  "Ex t s1 s2 #i. StateTransition(t,s1,s2)@i & Command(t,'Step')@i"

lemma executable_Stop: exists-trace
  "Ex t s1 s2 #i. StateTransition(t,s1,s2)@i & Command(t,'Stop')@i"

end
